name: @riddledc/riddle-proof-local
description: Network-free, read-only local document snapshot capture for Riddle Proof.
author: RiddleDC

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/cli.ts src/stableRead.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --out-dir dist --clean
scripts.test:grounded: pnpm --dir ../riddle-proof-core build && npm run build && node --require ../../scripts/deny-network.cjs grounded-integration.test.js
scripts.test:meaning: pnpm --dir ../riddle-proof-core build && npm run build && node --require ../../scripts/deny-network.cjs meaning-integration.test.js
scripts.test:review: pnpm --dir ../riddle-proof-core build && npm run build && node --require ../../scripts/deny-network.cjs review-protocol-integration.test.js
